text.title: Design Review PR Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying design review pr checklist end-to-end.

step.name: classify-pr
step.action: Run pr-diff-classification (haiku); if no UI files touched, skip and exit with n/a.
step.decision-gate: If non-UI PR, exit early — methodology does not apply.

step.name: run-ten-items
step.action: Run each of the 10 items in order; emit pass / needs-changes / n/a-with-reason per item with evidence link.
step.decision-gate: If reviewer is not designer/design-engineer, abort and re-route per designer-reviewer-required.

step.name: flag-deltas
step.action: For each deviation from handoff, write a deltas_flagged_back entry naming the item + description.
step.output: Deltas list ready for designer accept/reject.

step.name: decide-and-comment
step.action: Decision = approve only when no needs-changes; else changes-needed; if deltas require handoff update, decision = needs-handoff-update.
step.decision-gate: If any item needs-changes, decision MUST NOT be approve.
